details: Implemented startSpaceInvaders() per spec. 5×11 alien grid with 3 types (squid/crab/octopus), pixel-art sprites with 2 animation frames, 4 destructible shields with arch cutout, UFO spawning, single-bullet rule, bomb drops from lowest alive alien per column, wave progression with shield carryover, invincibility frames, hi-score tracking. Added touch controls (left/right + fire). Health endpoint confirms 5 games.
